SELECT even(value) FROM test_numeric WHERE value > 0;
SELECT even(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_numeric WHERE value < 0) AS negative_values;
SELECT t1.value, even(t1.value) AS even_value FROM test_numeric AS t1 JOIN (SELECT value FROM test_numeric WHERE value > 2) AS t2 ON t1.value < t2.value;
WITH rounded_values AS (SELECT even(value) AS rounded FROM test_numeric) SELECT rounded FROM rounded_values WHERE rounded > 0;
SELECT t1.value, even(t1.value) FROM test_numeric AS t1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_numeric AS t2 WHERE t1.value < t2.value);
SELECT SUM(even(value)) FROM test_numeric GROUP BY even(value);
CREATE TABLE more_test_cases (value FLOAT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO more_test_cases VALUES (2.5, 'halfway'), (4.5, 'halfway'), (-2.5, 'halfway negative'), (-4.5, 'halfway negative'), (10.1, 'above ten');
SELECT value, even(value) FROM more_test_cases WHERE description LIKE '%halfway%';
